purpose: Current production bundle debt ceiling. The v3.51.24 Export Wizard authorization and delivery boundary measures 4,578,450 raw / 1,313,642 gzip JavaScript bytes on the reviewed Windows source tree. Against the v3.51.23 clean source artifact (4,573,782 / 1,312,186), the delta is +4,668 raw / +1,456 gzip (under 0.12%) for exact Settings export capability propagation, mode/entity fail-closed guards, typed request/provider/audit/artifact/download validation including malformed runtime shapes, stale-scope and synchronous single-flight handling, truthful XLS metadata, localized outcome-safe copy and accessible control state. The largest chunk is 1,785,150 raw / 567,946 gzip. No database, Edge wire contract, CSS, runtime dependency or route was added. The reviewed ceilings retain only 128 raw / 279 gzip bytes of total cross-platform and release-SHA tolerance and 128 raw / 36 gzip bytes for the largest chunk. Further increases require an explicit measured baseline review.
